sharkord.author: Diogo Martino
sharkord.description: A plugin that allows users to stream music directly within Sharkord

scripts.build:dev: bun run build && cp -r bin/* dist/sharkord-music-bot/bin && chmod +x dist/sharkord-music-bot/bin/ffmpeg && chmod +x dist/sharkord-music-bot/bin/yt-dlp && cp -r dist/* /home/martino/repos/sharkord/apps/server/data/plugins/
scripts.build:zip: bun run build && rm -rf dist/sharkord-music-bot/bin* && zip -r sharkord-music-bot.zip dist/*
